howItWorks.intro: This brics currency impact calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Impact varies by scenario — models approximate based on historical currency transitions

faq.question: Will BRICS create a new currency?
faq.answer: BRICS nations have discussed trade settlement mechanisms and potentially a gold-backed unit of account. A full reserve currency is unlikely soon, but bilateral trade in local currencies is already increasing.

howWeCalculate.intro: This brics currency impact calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
